label: Transparent red fox profile motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Red Fox transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a boreal red fox profile mammal motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as a single complete subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A red fox in alert side profile with rust-orange fur, white chest and muzzle markings, black ears and legs, bushy tail with pale tip, sharp triangular face, amber eyes, and subtle pine-green boreal edge reflected shadows. Anatomical accuracy, crisp subject edges, smart fox identity, no otter, no dog.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; include full fox body, head, legs, and tail without cropping. Clean studio lighting, no cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no river otter, no domestic dog, no wolf, no forest landscape, no snow scene, no props, no text, no watermark.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Red Fox light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Red Fox", derived from the visible boreal red fox profile cutout. This board is a source reference for implementing a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible smart operations system.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Red Fox, Red Fox Profile, Palette, Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Extract the palette and interaction language from rust-orange fox fur, white muzzle and tail markings, black ears and paws, pine-green boreal context, winter-fur surfaces, burnt sienna shadows, and charcoal depth. The board must read as red fox, not otter, dog, wolf, or generic orange operations UI.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, operations table rows, search command palette, task navigation, operations dashboard metric cards, status charts, queue table, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Style: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, precise grid, 8px card radius, snow-field backgrounds, fox-rust primary actions, white-marking surfaces, pine-green focus and success accents, black-point borders, tail-sweep highlights, subtle fur-grain texture.
Constraints: no otter brown river palette, no dog or wolf imagery, no generic purple/blue gradients, no unrelated saturated colors, no beige-only palette, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Red Fox", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Red Fox dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Red Fox". It must feel like the visible light-mode board translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from the visible boreal red fox profile cutout.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Red Fox, Red Fox Profile, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Preserve the red fox system language: black-point dark backgrounds, snow-field text, fox-rust active controls, white-marking cards, pine-green focus and success, burnt-sienna highlights, charcoal-paw borders, fur-grain texture, 8px shadcn/tweakcn grid. Must read as red fox, not otter, dog, wolf, or generic orange operations UI.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, operations table rows, search command palette, task navigation, operations dashboard metric cards, status charts, queue table, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Visual details: black-point and charcoal-paw surfaces, snow-field foreground, fox-rust controls, burnt-sienna highlights, pine-green status, white-marking chips, subtle fur-grain overlays, restrained contrast, crisp cards and controls.
Constraints: no otter brown river palette, no dog or wolf imagery, no neon colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no pure-black-only flat background, no illegible tiny paragraphs, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Red Fox".
